citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:50am on
3/19/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee via phone call on arrival to the facility's property gate. The licensee
answered and said he was out of town and would not be back until 4:30pm. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is
serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:50am on 
3/19/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee via phone call on arrival to the facility's property gate. The licensee 
answered and said he was out of town and would not be back until 4:30pm. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is 
serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
